surfaces.label: Controlled source context
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText:
Controlled evidence reference: SYN-PROV-TITLE-01
Controlled synthetic technical control — independent expected-truth source (test-harness design, not the probe's own rendered output).
Probe design: Controlled raw-extraction / truncated-title provenance probe
Controlled input construction: Test harness supplies a quoted excerpt with an unterminated quotation mark, independent of any real client bundle.
Expected behaviour under test: Provenance boundary must refuse the unsafe title rather than presenting it as a safe evidence title.

surfaces.label: Evidence title
surfaces.solicitorVisibleText: Evidence title withheld — incomplete quotation or truncated excerpt cannot be shown as a title. Check the source papers.
